name: Card
description: RouterMarquee card item. Supports horizontal and vertical orientations with optional ProgressBar. Used inside a RouterMarquee container — not a standalone card.

props.name: label
props.description: Short label text, typically a product or category name

props.name: body
props.description: Optional body text or template below the label

props.name: tone
props.description: knockout = white text (on dark), default = standard text

props.name: active
props.description: Marks the card as the currently selected item

notes: Active state should be communicated via aria-pressed or aria-current depending on context.
ProgressBar inside communicates progress to screen readers via role='progressbar' and aria-valuenow.
